messages.content: Certainly! Please provide the sentence you would like me to edit.
May I know is the Goods Receiving and Vendor GR in the main menu a default for nursing staff?
Is the Goods Receiving and Vendor GR in the main menu a default option for nursing staff?
Do not order MEDGYN UTERINE MANIPULATOR once completed
Please refrain from ordering the MEDGYN UTERINE MANIPULATOR once it is completed.
To order from Central Store when completed
Please place an order from the Central Store once it is completed.
To place an order as ad hoc, please proceed once it is completed.
I know but the Nurse role keep appearing in vendor GR or goods receiving in the main menu of PDA
I understand, but it seems that the Nurse role continues to appear in the Vendor GR or Goods Receiving section of the main menu on the PDA.
I know but the Nurse role keep appearing in vendor GR or goods receiving in the main menu of PDA. For Example, nursing staff PIMS user id WHO029941.

I understand your concern. It appears that the Nurse role, specifically for the nursing staff with PIMS user ID WHO029941, continues to appear in the Vendor GR or Goods Receiving section of the main menu on the PDA.
For example, you can check this nursing staff PIMS user id WHO029941.

Thank you for providing the specific PIMS user ID. I will check on this issue, specifically regarding the nursing staff with PIMS user ID WHO029941, and the appearance of the Nurse role in the Vendor GR or Goods Receiving section of the main menu on the PDA.
Our user encounter that there are some stains on the sterile gloves. Please avoid delivering lot no. 2305451304
We have received reports that there are stains on the sterile gloves, specifically related to lot number 2305451304. Please refrain from delivering gloves from this lot number.
